vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first action was to calibrate the visual field against the expected registry; my validation confirms that the registry is currently unsupported by the physical evidence. The pots appear to be empty of vegetation. The white rabbit anchor is the only consistent biological/structural marker. The environment is suffering from a total lack of visible photosynthetic activity. The 'Systemic Loss' status is applied to all registered specimens.
